programme.title: You Cant Win Em All
programme.desc: As the Ottoman Empire collapses throughout Turkey in 1922, a number of adventurers from all over the world sign on to protect the locals from thieves and marauders--for a hefty price. Two such mercenaries are Adam and Josh, who are hired by provincial Turkish governor Osman. Adam and Josh are expected to protect their boss' gold shipment, and to provide safe conduct for Osman Bey's three daughters. Along the way, our 'heroes' decide to forget their mission and abscond with the gold, but their plans are foiled by their own inherent ineptitude--and by the bothersome interference of duplicitous Colonel Elci.

programme.desc: A German hermit, who can talk with worms, seeks revenge on the town's mayor by putting mutant worms in everyone's meals and turning them into human worm slaves.

programme.title: Trinity Is Still My Name
programme.desc: Two brothers try to fulfill the promise they made to their dying father.

programme.title: You Cant Win Em All
programme.desc: As the Ottoman Empire collapses throughout Turkey in 1922, a number of adventurers from all over the world sign on to protect the locals from thieves and marauders--for a hefty price. Two such mercenaries are Adam and Josh, who are hired by provincial Turkish governor Osman. Adam and Josh are expected to protect their boss' gold shipment, and to provide safe conduct for Osman Bey's three daughters. Along the way, our 'heroes' decide to forget their mission and abscond with the gold, but their plans are foiled by their own inherent ineptitude--and by the bothersome interference of duplicitous Colonel Elci.

programme.title: Meet the Fockers
programme.desc: Greg Focker and his fiancée Pam decide to make their respective parents meet before their wedding. However, the Fockers' relaxed attitude does not go down well with Pam's family.

credits.actor: Robert De Niro,Ben Stiller,Dustin Hoffman,Barbra Streisand,Blythe Danner,Teri Polo,Tim Blake Nelson,Alanna Ubach,Ray Santiago,Kali Rocha,Shelley Berman,Owen Wilson,Spencer Pickren,Bradley Pickren

programme.title: Lay the Favorite
programme.sub-title: Ambitious about living the life of a cocktail waitress, a lap dancer tries her luck in Las Vegas. However, her life takes an unexpected turn after she falls in love with a sports gambler
programme.desc: A former stripper's (Rebecca Hall) talent with numbers lands her a job with a professional gambler (Bruce Willis) who runs a sports book in Las Vegas.

credits.actor: Bruce Willis,Rebecca Hall,Catherine Zeta-Jones,Vince Vaughn,Joshua Jackson,Laura Prepon,Frank Grillo,Wayne Pere,John Carroll Lynch,Corbin Bernsen

programme.title: Mune
programme.desc: Necross, the former guardian of the sun, turns evil and steals it. Now, Mune, Glim and Sohone, three friends, must work together to retrieve it from him.

credits.actor: Omar Sy,Izïa Higelin,Michael Gregorio,Benoît Allemane,Féodor Atkine,Joshua Ballard,Trevor Devall,Damien Boisseau

programme.title: The Love Laugh Live Show
programme.sub-title: The host invites prominent personalities and engages them in candid conversations about their personal and professional lives
programme.desc: Candid conversations with celebrity guests, who share details about their personal and professional lives.

programme.title: The Love Laugh Live Show
programme.sub-title: The host invites prominent personalities and engages them in candid conversations about their personal and professional lives
programme.desc: Candid conversations with celebrity guests, who share details about their personal and professional lives.

programme.title: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: An advice columnist attempts to make a man dump her in 10 days, but he makes a bet with his boss that he will make her fall in love with him.

credits.actor: Kate Hudson,Matthew McConaughey,Adam Goldberg,Michael Michele,Shalom Harlow,Bebe Neuwirth,Robert Klein,Kathryn Hahn,Thomas Lennon,Annie Parisse

programme.title: The Notebook
programme.sub-title: Duke reads the story of Allie and Noah, two lovers who were separated by fate, to Ms Hamilton, an old woman who suffers from dementia, on a daily basis out of his notebook
programme.desc: In the 1940s South Carolina, mill worker Noah Calhoun (Ryan Gosling) and rich girl Allie (Rachel McAdams) are desperately in love. But her parents don't approve. When Noah goes off to serve in World War II, it seems to mark the end of their love affair. In the interim, Allie becomes involved with another man (James Marsden). But when Noah returns to their small town years later, on the cusp of Allie's marriage, it soon becomes clear that their romance is anything but over.

programme.title: Safe Haven

Armed with newfound confidence, skill and wisdom, Daniel ultimately faces off against his tormentors in this hugely popular classic underdog tale.
